entities.description: Variances estimated for agronomic characters to understand inheritance patterns

entities.description: A specific analysis method by Griffing (1956) used for diallel trials

entities.description: A specific analysis model by Griffing (1956) used for diallel trials

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: An agronomic character found to be predominantly under additive inheritance

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomic character found to be predominantly under additive inheritance

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: An agronomic character found to be predominantly under additive inheritance

entities.name: ADDITIVE INHERITANCE
entities.description: A type of genetic inheritance where the effect of alleles is cumulative

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic components

entities.name: NUMBER OF BRANCHES
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic components

entities.name: PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic components

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: An agronomic character influenced by both additive and non-additive genetic components

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENETIC COMPONENTS
entities.description: Genetic components such as dominance and epistasis that influence traits

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: GCA, the average performance of a parent in a series of crosses

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: SCA, the performance of a specific cross relative to the expected average

entities.name: GENERATION
entities.description: The stage of the plant lineage, such as F1 or F2, used for estimating GCA

entities.name: COMBINED DIALLEL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of diallel trials across multiple locations

entities.name: LOCATION
